errors.pageNotFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

home.metaDesc: Discover artisanal gourmet cookies and join the AMYRAX monthly subscription for freshly baked treats at your door.
home.subscriptionHeadline: 12 fresh cookies, delivered to your door.
home.promoSubtitle: Discover our limited editions and this month's favorites.

explore.metaDesc: Explore our full range of artisanal gourmet cookies at AMYRAX.
explore.title: Browse Cookies

c1.name: Chocolate Chunk
c1.desc: A rich, buttery vanilla cookie amped up with semi-sweet chocolate chunks.
c1.caption: Buttery vanilla with semi-sweet chunks

c2.name: Snickerdoodle
c2.desc: Stick to a classic with our Snickerdoodle. A warm, soft cookie rolled in cinnamon sugar.
c2.caption: Soft, warm cinnamon sugar

c3.name: Sugar
c3.desc: Simply the best melt-in-your-mouth, buttery sugar cookie you've ever tasted.
c3.caption: Melt-in-your-mouth buttery sweet

c4.name: Double Chocolate Chunk
c4.desc: Our dark chocolate cookie packed with rich chocolate chunks. For true chocolate lovers.
c4.caption: Dark cocoa packed with chunks

c5.name: Oatmeal Raisin
c5.desc: A treat that's like a hug for the soul. Warm oats and plump raisins in every bite.
c5.caption: Warm oats and plump raisins

c6.name: White Chocolate Macadamia
c6.desc: This snack operates on island time. A coconut-buttery cookie with white chocolate and macadamia nuts.
c6.caption: Coconut-buttery, tropical vibes

c7.name: Classic with M&M'S®
c7.desc: This colorful candy-coated twist on our classic chocolate chip is a sweet surprise.
c7.caption: Candy-coated chocolate twist

c8.name: Peanut Butter Chip
c8.desc: Peanut butter chips folded into a soft, sweet vanilla cookie. Nutty heaven.
c8.caption: Soft vanilla, peanut butter chips

c9.name: Vegan Chocolate Chunk
c9.desc: A vegan cookie that warms your soul with loads of dairy-free chocolate chunks.
c9.caption: Dairy-free chocolate chunks

c10.name: Double Chocolate Mint
c10.desc: Our take on a favorite flavor combo. A warm chocolate cookie with cool mint chips.
c10.caption: Warm chocolate with cool mint

p6.name: 6-Pack
p6.desc: Treat yourself to 6 warm, delicious treats in one box.

p9.name: 9-Pack
p9.desc: The sweet spot of satisfaction. Select 9 of your favorite cookies.

p12.name: 12-Pack
p12.desc: What they REALLY mean when they say to bring enough for everyone.

packs.ingredients: Enriched wheat flour, butter, cane sugar, brown sugar, eggs, semi-sweet chocolate chunks, vanilla extract, baking soda, sea salt.
packs.allergens: Contains wheat, dairy, eggs, soy. May contain traces of tree nuts and peanuts.

subscribe.metaDesc: Choose your AMYRAX cookie subscription plan. Delivered Mondays and Fridays only.
subscribe.title: Subscription Plans
subscribe.scheduleHint: Only Mondays and Fridays are selectable.
subscribe.usedAll: You've used all {{count}} deliveries on this plan. Upgrade to add more.

starter.title: Starter Plan
starter.desc: Perfect for essentials. Schedule up to 2 deliveries per month on your choice of Mondays or Fridays.

essential.title: Essential Plan
essential.desc: Our most popular choice. Enjoy up to 4 deliveries per month. Flexible scheduling: use them weekly, bi-weekly, or however fits your routine.

intermediate.title: Intermediate Plan
intermediate.desc: Extra flexibility for active households. Get up to 6 deliveries per month scheduled on Mondays or Fridays.

premium.title: Premium Plan
premium.desc: Full monthly coverage. Maximum convenience with up to 8 deliveries per month (twice a week on Mondays and Fridays).

profile.metaDesc: Manage your AMYRAX account, orders, and subscription.
profile.title: My Profile

qr.title: Your QR Code
qr.description: Scan to visit the AMYRAX store directly from any device.

cart.title: Your Cart
cart.emptyDesc: Add some delicious cookies to get started.
cart.demoNote: Demo checkout — no real charge will be made.
cart.thanksDesc: Your cookies are on their way. A confirmation has been sent.

subscribeGate.dialogTitle: Subscribe to activate your deliveries and shop
subscribeGate.dialogDesc: Purchases and deliveries are available only to subscribed members.
subscribeGate.freeShipping: FREE delivery ($0) included in every plan!
subscribeGate.bannerSubcopy: FREE delivery ($0) included in every plan!
subscribeGate.cartWarning: You need an active subscription to checkout.
subscribeGate.cartTerms: By confirming your order, you accept the store's terms of service.
subscribeGate.noActive: You don't have an active subscription. Subscribe to start scheduling deliveries.

checkout.title: Secure Checkout
checkout.addressRequired: You must complete your address (name, street, city, ZIP and phone) to be able to purchase.
checkout.bakingMsg: Your cookies are baking and on their way.

domains.title: Domain Search
domains.subtitle: Find an available domain. We check live availability and suggest similar alternatives.
domains.priceDisclaimer: Prices are estimates of first-year registration cost in USD at common registrars and may vary. * promotional price for the first year.

ruleta.metaDesc: Spin the ORIGEN Roulette. Buy Stars or enter free by following our social channels and claim premium prizes.
ruleta.ogDesc: Prizes, discounts and surprise flavors. Free entry available.
ruleta.needStars: You need {{n}} more star(s) to spin.
ruleta.buyStarsSubtitle: Stack stars and redeem them for tickets in the Daily Draw.
ruleta.mustAcceptTerms: You must accept the Terms and confirm participation is legal where you live.
ruleta.termsAfter: and confirm that participating in this sweepstakes is legal where I live.
ruleta.fairPlayDesc: Cryptographic random selection · public weighting · auditable
ruleta.noPurchaseRequired: NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Purchase does not increase chances of winning. 18+. Void where prohibited.
ruleta.amoeButton: Don't want to buy Stars? Enter for free here →
ruleta.amoeIntro: Official free entry (AMOE). 1 real ticket in today's draw with the same weight as a paid ticket. NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER.
ruleta.amoeReceived: We got your free entry! 🎟️ You have 1 ticket in today's draw.
ruleta.mustAcceptRules: You must accept the Official Rules.
ruleta.essayTooShort: The essay must be at least 300 words.

fields.essay: Original essay: tell us why you like ORIGEN (min. 300 words)

ruleta.rulesCheckbox: I confirm I am 18+, a legal U.S. resident (except FL, NY, RI) and accept the
ruleta.mailAlternative: As a postal alternative, send a handwritten postcard with: name, address, email, phone and date of birth to the address listed in the
ruleta.missionsIntro: You have your base token! Complete these missions to earn up to 9 ⭐ more and reach {{cost}}.
ruleta.legalIntro: Sweepstakes Rules: NO PURCHASE NECESSARY to enter or win. Buying Stars does not increase your chances of winning. Free alternate method of entry (AMOE) available above via form and social missions. Valid where allowed by law. Each prize is awarded at random via weighted selection algorithm. Redeemable codes are single-use.
ruleta.dailyDrawAt: Daily draw at 8:00 PM (Eastern Time) · automated

liveDraw.preLaunchTitle: We're finalizing the Official Sweepstakes Rules
liveDraw.preLaunchDescAfter: and enter for free (AMOE). We'll announce the first USD draw date soon.
liveDraw.noWinnersYet: No draws completed yet. You could be the first!
liveDraw.adminDesc: Run the draw manually (idempotent — won't repeat if there's already a winner today).
liveDraw.runDrawConfirm: Run TODAY's draw now? This is real and selects a winner.
liveDraw.alreadyDrawn: ℹ️ The draw is already marked completed. Running again will return the same result.
